category_sources: source_facts.description says Granted is a way to access your cloud; official Granted FAQ describes it as a CLI using AWS services and AWS SSO.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is granted; official site and docs at https://granted.dev/ and https://docs.granted.dev/ use Granted.
docs_sources: Official Granted documentation is published at https://docs.granted.dev/ with getting-started and FAQ pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/fwdcloudsec/granted, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables include assume/granted and official Granted FAQ describes AWS, AWS SSO, and cloud access workflows.
